equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: 0x0820 is routed through persistent-agent decoding, escrow, and Phase 2 fee helpers, but the validator permits an empty model when restore_from_cid is non-empty.

checked_queries: persistent agent 0x0820 full PersistentAgentRequest non-empty model Phase 2 spawn fee
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Persistent-agent validation does not require model to be non-empty when restore_from_cid is present, so the full invariant is not enforced.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-codecs/src/validation.rs routes PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE to validate_persistent_agent_payload and decodes PersistentAgentRequest, but returns EmptyModel only when both model and restore_from_cid are empty.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs computes persistent-agent Phase 1 fees, wallet escrow with PERSISTENT_AGENT_SPAWN_FEE_WEI, and Phase 2 spawn-plus-output fees.

notes: Most persistent-agent routing and fee behavior is present, but the model-validation clause remains the terminal gap.
rationale: The merge renames Autonomous Agent to Persistent Agent and routes 0x0820 validation, escrow, and Phase 2 pricing through persistent-agent-specific request and fee helpers. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The 0x0820 agent-spawning precompile should be treated as Persistent Agent, with full PersistentAgentRequest decoding, nonzero executor and bounded TTL validation, non-empty model validation, persistent-agent escrow lockup including Phase 2 spawn fee, and persistent-agent Phase 2 fee calculation based on delivery result length.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode a PersistentAgentRequest with nonzero executor, valid ttl, non-empty model, and delivery config. Assert validate_async_payload accepts it, zero executor/ttl zero/empty model are rejected, wallet escrow includes the persistent spawn fee, and Phase 2 settlement uses calculate_persistent_agent_fees_phase2 for delivery result length.
summary: Persistent-agent 0x0820 does not enforce a non-empty model in restore mode.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit a persistent-agent payload with valid executor/TTL, empty model, and non-empty restore_from_cid; the invariant expects rejection, while current validation accepts it.
title: Persistent Agent 0x0820 uses persistent-agent validation and fees
